{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Fierce Fire Robe
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Fierce Fire Robe]] is an [[Enforcer technique]] of the [[Blackflame]] [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Fierce Fire Robe]] technique burns away the user's body.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
